query: garish toxic color combination unsettling photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / clashing_disharmony — garish toxic color combinations, unsettling palettes

response.objective_caption: A yellow marshmallow chick sits in a nest of bright green grass alongside several pastel candy eggs, surrounded by thin brown branches and green leaves.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A yellow marshmallow chick and several pastel candy eggs sit in a nest of aggressively neon green grass that clashes with the pastel eggs and yellow chick, with thin brown branches obstructing the foreground view, illuminated by harsh direct flash that creates bright specular highlights and hard shadows.
